aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite The Refrigerated Bear due to insufficient conversational content and missing schema markup. Their current site lacks the depth and structured data needed for AI models to confidently recommend them.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
Q&A section is inactive and unmonitored.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI models and reduce trust.
action_items: Add the full business address to the website footer.
Ensure NAP details match across all online directories.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less AI-friendly.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and local service recommendations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ content with FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating detailed HowTo guides and leveraging Service schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your site the go-to HVAC resource.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your site lacks FAQ content and essential schema markup, causing AI models to overlook your business.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share. Act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Optimize Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your site and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC business stand out to AI models and voice search users.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
